text: Every green leaf is a solar factory older than civilization. Inside each leaf, light transforms into life. But how? It starts with photons hitting chlorophyll, the green pigment. These photons power reactions, splitting water and releasing oxygen. But it doesn't stop there. Carbon dioxide enters the game! In a cycle, these elements create sugars—the fuel of life. Curious about how plants keep our planet thriving? Like and follow for more!
